prompt: A clean premium wellness advertisement on a soft warm beige studio background with gentle natural shadows and a minimal editorial aesthetic. At the very top center, place the brand name naali in elegant dark brown serif typography. Centered in the upper half, show a large white rounded testimonial card with a subtle drop shadow containing exactly 2 stacked social-style review posts separated by a thin divider line. The first post has a circular gold avatar with the initials “ML”, the username “marie.lbx” with a small blue verification badge, and the French review text: “Franchement je dormais pas bien depuis des semaines... 3 jours avec les gommes naali et je me sens enfin posée. 🧡” with a like count below reading “1,847” followed by a small gold heart. The second post has a circular terracotta avatar with the initials “SC”, the username “sofiacr__”, and the French review text: “Pareil pour moi, le safran c'est magique. Plus jamais sans 🌿✨” with a like count below reading “892” followed by a small gold heart. In the lower left, place a rectangular metal tin of saffron gummies in a matte amber-orange gradient with a white lid, photographed straight-on. The tin prominently shows the brand name “naali” and product text including “ANTI-STRESS”, “RELAXATION / HUMEUR POSITIVE”, “safran”, “Safran”, “Vitamines B3, B6, B9, B12”, “Goût mangue”, and “60 gommes”. In the lower center, arrange exactly 4 stacked citrus fruits in a playful vertical balancing sculpture: a small orange at the top, a mandarin beneath it, another mandarin beneath that, and a large yellow lemon at the bottom, with realistic texture and glossy highlights. Place exactly 2 translucent orange gummy pieces on the surface near the lemon. On the right side, add a bold luxury serif headline in golden brown reading Elles ont trouvé le calme. and below it a smaller dark text subheadline reading Maintenant à toi. Gommes au safran.. Use soft directional lighting from the upper left, smooth shadows, refined French skincare-supplement ad styling, balanced spacing, warm monochromatic tones of cream, amber, orange, yellow, and brown, and a polished photorealistic product-photography look.
